/usr/local/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CUDAOpenGLInterop.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CUDAOpenGLInterop.dir/src/kernel.cu.o CMakeFiles/CUDAOpenGLInterop.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CUDAOpenGLInterop.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o CUDAOpenGLInterop   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda-12.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcurand.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglut.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXmu.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
